calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Prove-Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Jordan Harrison Insurance Brokers, Inc. and Jeffrey L. Dickow.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Frankston, Esq. appeared for plaintiff RLI Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Jordan Harrison Insurance Brokers, Inc. or Jeffrey L. Dickow.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 6, 2017.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 8, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 4, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 20, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff RLI Insurance Company, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Jordan Harrison Insurance Brokers, Inc., a corporation, and Jeffrey L. Dickow, as an individual, as follows:

Damages - $41,125.61.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,073.98.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $710.00.

Total - $46,109.59.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To May-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
